text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper exists under the title "DrugChat: Towards Enabling ChatGPT-Like Capabilities on Drug Molecule **Graphs**" (arXiv:2309.03907), authored by Youwei Liang, Ruiyi Zhang, Li Zhang, and Pengtao Xie. The cited reference has a subtly different title ("...on Drug Molecule **Data**"), a wrong arXiv ID (2304.02285, which points to a completely unrelated paper), the wrong year context, and entirely fabricated authors (none of the six cited authors match the four real ones).
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.03907
